rows.label: qev002201_MSG0005
rows.name:
My work as director general can truly
begin once peace is finally upon us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev002201_MSG0006
rows.name:
I promise to transform our NLA
into a city every bit as impressive
as the Los Angeles of old.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev002201_MSG0007
rows.name:
But we're not there yet, so I'm counting
on you BLADE operatives to lend us your
talents for a little while longer.[ST:wait ]
